generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution angular position sensor mounted directly on the motor shaft providing real-time feedback for closed-loop control. Part of dual encoder system for precise position measurement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary high-resolution angular position sensor positioned behind the gearbox to measure output angle, providing redundant feedback for torque transmission validation and backlash compensation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxOutputEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor, critical for monitoring motor performance, torque calculation, and overcurrent protection."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorShaftEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
    base:desc "Time-series data stream containing high-resolution angular position measurements from the motor shaft encoder, transmitted via MQTT protocol for real-time monitoring."
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
    base:desc "Time-series data stream containing output angle measurements from the gearbox encoder, transmitted via MQTT protocol to validate gearbox performance and compensate for mechanical backlash."
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Time-series data stream containing motor input current measurements, transmitted via MQTT protocol for real-time torque and performance monitoring."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (IBD) model representing the component & connector perspective of the MABI MAX 100 robot axis, including components (motor, gearbox, controller), interfaces, interconnections, and composition across functional and logical architecture layers."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler, MontiArcAutomatonEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using MontiArc Automaton to describe state machines and automata for the robot axis control logic, integrated with SysML for comprehensive system behavior representation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomatonEnabler, SimulinkIntegrationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed behavioral simulation model in MathWorks Simulink for dynamic systems and control logic of the permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearbox, and closed-loop control system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkIntegrationEnabler, CppImplementationEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed motor input current data aggregated from time-series streams, normalized and validated for torque calculation and overcurrent detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MotorShaftPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed angular position data from motor shaft encoder, filtered and synchronized with gearbox output for precise closed-loop control validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance GearboxOutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed output angle data from gearbox encoder, used to validate gear ratio and compensate for mechanical backlash in the transmission system."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxOutputEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool enabling multi-layered system description (requirements, functional/logical architectures, product layers) and Internal Block Diagrams for component/connector modeling."
    DTDFVocab:enables IntegrationService
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton tool extending ADLs with behavioral modeling capabilities via state machines/automata for robot axis control logic."
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralAnalysisService, ControlLogicService
]

instance SimulinkIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink integration enabling detailed behavioral simulation of dynamic systems, control logic, and hybrid modeling with ADLs."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, ControlValidationService
]

instance CppImplementationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming environment for implementing custom logic, algorithms, and active components in the Digital Twin, such as data processing and control loops."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingService, FrictionCompensationService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software agents and state machines (MontiArc Automaton) processing incoming sensor data traces to derive actionable insights, including filtering, normalization, and validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataInterpretationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT communication protocol facilitating real-time or near-real-time transmission of time-series sensor data from physical components to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAcquisitionService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataInterpretationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service processing and contextualizing sensor and operational data traces (motor currents, gearbox torque, controller logs) to derive actionable insights for monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorPerformanceInsight, GearboxHealthInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service rendering system states and operational metrics in dashboards for stakeholders (engineers, operators) to monitor robot axis performance in real time."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardInsight
]

instance BehavioralAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service leveraging model-based abstractions (functional/logical architectures) to simulate and validate system behavior under varying conditions, including fault scenarios."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlStabilityInsight, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing detailed behavioral simulations in MathWorks Simulink to validate control logic, dynamic response, and system stability before physical deployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ControlValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating closed-loop control performance by comparing simulated and real-time data from motor shaft and gearbox encoders, ensuring positional accuracy and torque transmission."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAccuracyInsight
]

instance DataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service aggregating, filtering, and normalizing sensor data streams to ensure consistency and derive processed data for downstream services."
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedDataInsight
]

instance IntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service facilitating interoperability between SysML models, Simulink simulations, and C++ implementations to maintain alignment across multi-notation models."
    DTDFVocab:provides IntegrationConsistencyInsight
]

instance ControlLogicService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing state machines and control algorithms (via MontiArc Automaton and C++) to adjust physical system parameters based on digital insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionCompensationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service modeling and compensating for friction loss in the gearbox transmission system using sensor feedback and control algorithms to improve positional accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCompensationAction
]

instance DataAcquisitionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing the collection, aggregation, and transmission of contextual data traces from physical components to the Digital Twin via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAcquisitionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance MotorPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from motor current and position data indicating real-time performance metrics such as torque output, efficiency, and thermal load."
]

instance GearboxHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from gearbox output angle and motor current data indicating transmission health, backlash compensation status, and potential wear indicators."
]

instance RealTimeDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of robot axis operational metrics (position, current, torque) in a real-time dashboard for monitoring and decision support."
]

instance ControlStabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the stability of the closed-loop control system under varying operational conditions, derived from behavioral simulations and real-time data comparison."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying potential faults or anomalies in the robot axis system (e.g., encoder discrepancies, torque spikes) through behavioral analysis and data validation."
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight validating the accuracy of Simulink control models against real-time physical data to ensure simulation fidelity before deployment."
]

instance ControlAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight quantifying the positional and torque accuracy of the closed-loop control system by comparing simulated and real-time encoder data."
]

instance ProcessedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing validated and normalized sensor data streams ready for downstream services, ensuring data consistency and quality."
]

instance IntegrationConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight ensuring alignment between SysML structural models, Simulink simulations, and C++ implementations to maintain system integrity across tools."
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters (e.g., PID gains) based on real-time performance insights to optimize robot axis operation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionCompensationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic compensation for friction loss in the gearbox transmission system using sensor feedback and control algorithms to improve positional accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataAcquisitionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful acquisition, transmission, and preprocessing of sensor data from physical components to the Digital Twin via MQTT protocol."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin constellation** is orchestrated through **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** methodologies, which integrate multiple modeling notations (e.g., SysML for architecture, MontiArc Automaton for behavior, or Simulink for simulation) and tools (e.g., C++, Java, or general-purpose languages). The system leverages **architecture description languages (ADLs)** like ACME, AADL, or SysML Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs) to define components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition. Coordination mechanisms are implied by the **component & connector perspective** of ADLs, where behavior is described via state machines (SysML v1.7) or automata (MontiArc). Resource management is not explicitly detailed, but the integration of heterogeneous tools and stakeholders (Section II.A) suggests a federated or service-oriented architecture pattern. No explicit system-wide coordination protocols (e.g., event-driven, publish-subscribe) are mentioned."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system’s **fidelity and validity** are implicitly addressed through:
  - **Model validation** via comparison of **simulated behavior** (using tools like **SysML** and **Simulink**) with **measured physical data** (e.g., sensor streams from encoders and current inputs) to derive and refine parameters such as **friction models** (as inferred from Section IV’s focus on data-driven corrections).
  - **Uncertainty quantification** is implied through the use of **data aggregation and abstraction** (per the Digital Shadow Reference Model) to filter noise and inconsistencies in sensor data before integration into the Digital Twin.
  - **Quality assurance** processes are suggested by the integration of **MBSE methodologies** (e.g., SysML, ADLs) and **simulation tools**, which enforce structured validation and verification (V&V) workflows. However, explicit details on **fidelity requirements**, **error correction mechanisms**, or **formal uncertainty quantification** are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **hosting and deployment infrastructure** for the Digital Shadow system is implicitly tied to **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** methodologies and tools, which may include **SysML** for modeling, **Simulink** or other simulation tools for behavioral analysis, and general-purpose languages like **C++ or Java** for implementation. However, no explicit details are provided regarding **hosting platforms** (e.g., cloud, edge, or on-premise), **computational/storage requirements**, **scalability mechanisms**, or **deployment models**. The document focuses on modeling and abstraction rather than infrastructure specifics, leaving these aspects undocumented."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system relies on **MQTT** for **real-time sensor data streaming** from the physical object (e.g., robot axis) to the digital shadow, ensuring **low-latency, event-driven communication**. Integration with **external modeling tools** (e.g., Simulink, C++, Java) and **heterogeneous stakeholders** is critical, as the system must aggregate and abstract **contextual data traces** for specific purposes. While the document does not specify **interoperability standards** beyond MQTT, it implies dependencies on **standardized data exchange protocols** (e.g., OPC UA, REST, or proprietary APIs) for broader enterprise system or Digital Twin ecosystem integration. No explicit mention of **blockchain, edge computing, or cloud orchestration** is provided."
]
